nasb.text: Then the Lord stirred up against Jehoram the spirit of the Philistines and the Arabs who bordered the Ethiopians;

esv.text: And the Lord stirred up against Jehoram the anger of the Philistines and of the Arabians who are near the Ethiopians.

cnv.text: 後來，耶和華激動了非利士人和靠近古實的阿拉伯人的心，和約蘭作對。

ccb.text: 耶和华驱使非利士人和古实附近的阿拉伯人攻打约兰。
